stories.title: Sights, sounds and more moments from the final rou...
stories.summary: The top of the leaderboard is crowded at Aronimink. Follow along here.

stories.title: Sources: SGA wins MVP for second straight year
stories.summary: Thunder star Shai Gilgeous-Alexander has won his second consecutive NBA Most Valuable Player award, becoming the 14th player in league history to win back-to-back MVPs, sources told ESPN's Shams Charania.

stories.title: Kitayama's 63 at PGA Championship ties mark
stories.summary: Kurt Kitayama tied the lowest final round in major championship history with a 7-under 63 at the PGA Championship.

stories.title: Ailing Astros lose Altuve to IL with oblique strai...
stories.summary: Astros second baseman Jose Altuve has a left oblique strain and will be placed on the injured list, manager Joe Espada said.

stories.title: Hamlin outduels Briscoe for 2nd All-Star Race win
stories.summary: Denny Hamlin edged teammate Chase Briscoe on Sunday to win NASCAR's All-Star Race, which saw several crashes during the first two segments collect more than half the 36-car field.
